name: bi-copilot
description: An expert copilot for analytics delivery: a growing bench of BI skills. Live: groundwork (orientation), requirements-interrogator (requirements), kpi-contract (metric definitions), and defend-my-number (defensibility).

plugins.name: bi-copilot
plugins.description: An expert copilot for analytics delivery, built as a growing bench of skills. Live: 'groundwork' (orient on an inherited estate and build a living knowledge base), 'requirements-interrogator' (drive a solution-shaped request to the real decision before building), 'kpi-contract' (pin a metric's exact definition and lock it as a versioned contract), and 'defend-my-number' (rehearse defending a number against a skeptic before the meeting).
